rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Training platform = Claude Code (CLI + Desktop) + Cowork.
Source URL + type label — mandatory. Scope: maintainer-block only, not student-facing body.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line:9 — '[Darragh Curran / practitioner direct](https://ideas.fin.ai/p/2x-nine-months-later)'; line:17 — '[Curran / practitioner direct](https://ideas.fin.ai/p/2x-nine-months-later)'; line:33 — '[Curran / practitioner direct](...)'; line:53 — '[Curran, *2x nine months later* / practitioner direct](...)'; line:55 — '[Geoff Charles / practitioner direct](...)'; line:57 — '[*Compound Engineering: The Definitive Guide* / practitioner direct](...)'. Source-type labels appear embedded in link text throughout student-facing body. Per 2026-05-03 compounded rule, labels belong in maintainer-block provenance only; body ships citations in builder voice (hyperlinked name/title, no taxonomy label).
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Strip '/ practitioner direct' from body link text; keep bare hyperlinked practitioner name or title. Labels already present in maintainer-block source-verification section — no new information lost.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Practitioner-interview write-ups: attribute writer + subject distinctly.
rules_evaluated.evidence: line:57 — '[*Compound Engineering: The Definitive Guide* / practitioner direct](https://every.to/source-code/compound-engineering-the-definitive-guide)'. Every Inc is a publication; if this is a journalist's write-up of Klaassen's work, the correct label is [practitioner analysis] not [practitioner direct], and attribution format should be 'WRITER on SUBJECT, *Title*'. Maintainer block itself flags uncertainty (line:91: 'Open the guide and confirm the count is 14'; line:105 TODOs: byline question open).
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Open every.to URL before first cohort — if Klaassen is the byline author, [practitioner direct] holds; if an Every journalist wrote it, flip to [practitioner analysis] with 'WRITER on Klaassen, *Compound Engineering...*' format. Already logged as a TODO in the maintainer block.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Hold short OODA loose. Single-source numbers get labeled single-source.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: All three anchor-case figures (Intercom, Ramp, Every/Klaassen) are single-source and the maintainer block explicitly flags them as such (lines 89–91). Body does not assert convergence. PASS with note that single-source disclosure lives correctly in maintainer block, not body.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Source-verification maintainer block on any student-facing file with practitioner citations.

platform_claims_checked.claim: No platform-capability claims present. File contains only practitioner CI/CD pattern descriptions.
